project_context.archetype: Archetype 5: Jewel & Luxury (with Traditional Chinese elements)
project_context.vibe: Heritage, premium, warm, rustic but luxurious. Deep imperial reds, golds, ink-blacks. Avoid generic tech-SaaS styles.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl md:text-7xl font-medium tracking-tight font-serif text-white
hierarchy.h2: text-4xl md:text-5xl font-medium tracking-tight font-serif text-brand-secondary
hierarchy.labels: text-xs md:text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-brand-secondary font-sans

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use p-8, p-12, py-24, py-32 for massive breathing room. Never cramp content. Wide gaps between sections.
layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Asymmetric bento for gallery. Loose two-column for About section. Center alignment for Hero and Menu.
layout_and_spacing.radius: Minimalist sharp edges. rounded-none or rounded-sm (max 2px). Do not use soft rounded corners.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.header: Crystal glassmorphism: bg-background-default/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/5. Sticky on top with z-50.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.cards: Subtle textured cards. border border-border-gold_subtle bg-background-surface. Add subtle drop-shadow on hover.

buttons.primary: bg-brand-primary text-white border border-brand-primary hover:bg-brand-primary/80 transition-all rounded-sm px-6 py-3 font-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-brand-secondary border border-brand-secondary hover:bg-brand-secondary hover:text-black transition-all rounded-sm px-6 py-3 font-medium

components.forms: Use Shadcn elements heavily customized. Input: bg-background-surface border-border-default focus:border-brand-secondary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-brand-secondary text-white.
components.menu_items: Use pure HTML/Tailwind. Flex container with item name (left), flex-grow border-b-2 border-dotted border-border-default mx-4 (middle), and price in gold (right).
components.animations: Lenis smooth scrolling (MANDATORY). Framer motion 'fade in up' for sections as they enter viewport. Subtle scale-up on gallery images on hover.

hero_background.description: Luxurious traditional Chinese restaurant interior for the hero section background. MUST USE bg-black/60 overlay to ensure text readability.

texture_background.description: Textured rustic Chinese rice paper background in dark charcoal. Use as background for the 'Menu' or 'Reservation' sections to break the solid black.

about_image.description: Master chef tossing flaming wok. Use in the 'About / 35 Year Legacy' section as a large visual anchor.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install the required font families from Google Fonts (Cormorant Garamond and Manrope) in the global CSS or index.html.
Install and configure 'lenis' for smooth scrolling.
Install 'framer-motion' for staggered entrance animations and hover effects.
Do NOT use pre-built Shadcn Cards for main marketing sections; build custom HTML bento grids and asymmetric layouts to keep the design fluid and premium.
Use Shadcn components solely for the Form logic (Reservation Form) to ensure accessibility, but override styles to match the dark heritage theme.
For the Contact section map, embed a standard Google Maps iframe for 'Amrut Nagar, Ghatkopar, Mumbai'.
Configure tailwind.config.js with the provided colors (e.g., brand-primary, brand-secondary) and font families (serif, sans).
Include 'data-testid' attributes on all interactive elements (buttons, form inputs, nav links) for testing.
